sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82413" key="peritroxasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιτροχ-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. for</abbr> -<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ισμός</itype> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:22:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.22.10</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
